case_title: ABDULLAH QARI VS. GUILLAME JEAN COHEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE:AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF QARI, ABDULLAH
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,335.00 FILED BY QARI, ABDULLAH AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, GUILLAUME JEAN
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QARI, ABDULLAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COHEN, GUILLAUME JEAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-09-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO CLAIM A HIGHER AMOUNT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF QARI, ABDULLAH AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, GUILLAUME JEAN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-18-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, GUILLAUME JEAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY QARI, ABDULLAH AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, GUILLAUME JEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
